indicators: Wish to be dead, no suicidal thoughts
action: Outpatient referral, safety planning, follow-up within 1 week

indicators: Suicidal thoughts without plan or intent
action: Safety planning, restrict access to means, frequent follow-up, consider higher level of care

indicators: Suicidal thoughts with plan, intent, or recent attempt
action: Immediate psychiatric evaluation, consider hospitalization, 24/7 crisis support, restrict access to lethal means
